title: elymus kronokensis
side_effects: Elymus kronokensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also cause liver damage and kidney failure in severe cases. In addition, improper use of Elymus kronokensis may lead to allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory problems. Furthermore, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can cause an imbalance of essential nutrients in the body, resulting in fatigue, weakness, and other health complications.
